releaseNotes:
v0.23.2 - phone AppBar layout fix:

- Fixes a bug where the three-dot overflow menu and other right-side icons were clipped off the right edge of the screen on phones held in portrait. Activity and Reports now fold into the overflow menu on narrow screens; Settings, sync indicator, and pull mode stay on the AppBar. On tablets and Windows the layout is unchanged.

Includes everything from v0.23.1 (multi-device sync refresh fix), v0.23.0 (camera barcode scanning, opt-in), and v0.22.2 (sell-readiness licensing + support polish).
